glosses.ro: a se plimba; a face o plimbare
glosses.ja: 散歩する; ぶらぶら歩く

translations.en: We go for a walk in the park.
translations.es: Vamos a pasear por el parque.
translations.fr: On se promène dans le parc.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đi dạo trong công viên.
translations.nl: We gaan wandelen in het park.
translations.nb: Vi går en tur i parken.
translations.sv: Vi tar en promenad i parken.
translations.da: Vi går en tur i parken.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; forms a light-verb construction with the infinitive 'spazieren' meaning 'to go for a walk'.
Contraction of preposition 'in' + article 'dem'; introduces a dative prepositional phrase indicating location.
Common noun, masculine, singular, dative as object of the preposition 'im'; head of a locative PP.
Bare infinitive complement (xcomp) to 'gehen', yielding the idiomatic motion expression 'spazieren gehen'.

translations.en: I want to walk alone today.
translations.fr: Aujourd'hui, je veux me promener seul.
translations.ru: Сегодня я хочу прогуляться в одиночку.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi muốn đi dạo một mình.
translations.hi: आज मैं अकेले टहलना चाहता हूँ।
translations.el: Σήμερα θέλω να κάνω βόλτα μόνος μου.
translations.nb: I dag vil jeg gå en tur alene.
translations.id: Hari ini aku ingin berjalan-jalan sendiri.
translations.sv: I dag vill jag promenera själv.
translations.ro: Astăzi vreau să mă plimb singur.
translations.da: I dag vil jeg gå en tur alene.
translations.ja: 今日は一人で散歩したいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 1st person singular; selects a bare infinitive complement.
Temporal adverb specifying the time frame.
Adverb of manner meaning 'alone'.
Bare infinitive main verb selected by the modal 'will'.

sentences.target: Die Kinder spazieren nach dem Mittagessen draußen.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈkɪndɐ ʃpaˈtsiːʁən naːx deːm ˈmɪtaːkˌʔɛsən ˈdʁaʊ̯sən/

translations.de: Die Kinder spazieren nach dem Mittagessen draußen.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈkɪndɐ ʃpaˈtsiːʁən naːx deːm ˈmɪtaːkˌʔɛsən ˈdʁaʊ̯sən/
translations.en: The children go for a walk outside after lunch.
translations.es: Los niños salen a dar un paseo después de almorzar.
translations.fr: Les enfants vont se promener dehors après le déjeuner.
translations.it: I bambini escono a fare una passeggiata dopo pranzo.
translations.zh-Hans: 孩子们午饭后到外面散步。
translations.yue: 小朋友喺食完晏之後出去散步。
translations.ru: Дети гуляют на улице после обеда.
translations.pt: As crianças vão passear lá fora depois do almoço.
translations.he: הילדים יוצאים לטייל בחוץ אחרי ארוחת הצהריים.
translations.tr: Çocuklar öğle yemeğinden sonra dışarıda dolaşıyor.
translations.vi: Bọn trẻ đi dạo ngoài trời sau bữa trưa.
translations.ar: الأطفال يخرجون للتنزه في الخارج بعد الغداء.
translations.nl: De kinderen gaan na de lunch buiten wandelen.
translations.hu: A gyerekek ebéd után kint sétálnak.
translations.hi: बच्चे दोपहर के खाने के बाद बाहर टहलने जाते हैं।
translations.pl: Dzieci idą na spacer na dwór po obiedzie.
translations.el: Τα παιδιά βγαίνουν για βόλτα έξω μετά το μεσημεριανό.
translations.nb: Barna går en tur ute etter lunsj.
translations.id: Anak-anak pergi berjalan-jalan di luar setelah makan siang.
translations.sv: Barnen går ut på promenad efter lunchen.
translations.ro: Copiii ies la plimbare afară după prânz.
translations.cs: Děti jdou po obědě ven na procházku.
translations.da: Børnene går en tur udenfor efter frokost.
translations.fi: Lapset menevät ulos kävelemään lounaan jälkeen.
translations.ja: 子どもたちは昼ごはんのあとに外を散歩します。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative plural; determiner of 'Kinder'.
Common noun, plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural.
Preposition governing the dative, introducing a temporal PP.
Definite article, dative singular neuter; agrees with 'Mittagessen'.
Common noun, neuter, singular; object of the preposition 'nach'.
Locative adverb indicating place.

translations.en: She likes to go for a walk in the evening.
translations.es: Le gusta salir a caminar por la tarde.
translations.fr: Elle aime se promener le soir.
translations.pt: Ela gosta de caminhar à noite.
translations.vi: Cô ấy thích đi dạo vào buổi tối.
translations.ar: هي تحب أن تتمشى في المساء.
translations.hi: उसे शाम को टहलना पसंद है।
translations.el: Της αρέσει να κάνει βόλτα το βράδυ.
translations.nb: Hun liker å gå tur om kvelden.
translations.id: Dia suka berjalan-jalan pada malam hari.
translations.sv: Hon gillar att promenera på kvällen.
translations.ro: Îi place să se plimbe seara.
translations.da: Hun kan godt lide at gå en tur om aftenen.
translations.ja: 彼女は夕方に散歩するのが好きです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular, nominative; subject (interpreted as 'she' from verb agreement).
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; combines with infinitive 'spazieren' to form 'spazieren gehen'.
Modal adverb expressing liking/preference.
Temporal adverb meaning 'in the evening(s)'.
Bare infinitive complement to 'geht', completing the light-verb construction.
